description.value: This is a straightforward translation request. The user wants me to translate the following text from English to Simplified Chinese (zh-CN): "As a bonus action, the orc can move up to its speed toward a hostile creature it can see." This appears to be a game rule or ability description, likely from Dungeons & Dragons or similar RPG system. Let me translate this: - "As a bonus action" - 作为附赠动作 - "the orc" - 兽人 - "can move" - 可以移动 - "up to its speed" - 最多其速度的距离 - "toward" - 朝向 - "a hostile creature" - 一个敌对生物 - "it can see" - 它能看见的 Putting it together: "作为附赠动作，兽人最多可以向其能看见的一个敌对生物移动最多等于其速度的距离。" Actually, let me refine this for better readability in Chinese gaming context: "作为附赠动作，兽人可向其能看见的一个敌对生物移动至多等于其速度的距离。" This sounds more natural in Chinese for game rules. 作为附赠动作，兽人可向其能看见的一个敌对生物移动至多等于其速度的距离。

description.value: The user wants me to translate a text about a melee weapon attack from English to Simplified Chinese (zh-CN). This is a game-related description, likely from Dungeons & Dragons or similar RPG. Let me translate this carefully: "Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11(1d12 + 5) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage. The target's maximum hit points are decreased in equal amount to the necrotic damage dealt. The target's hit point maximum does not return to normal until it finishes a long rest or its grievous wounds are soothed by a greater restoration spell." Let me translate piece by piece: - Melee Weapon Attack = 近战武器攻击 - +8 to hit = +8 命中 - reach 5 ft. = 触及 5 尺 - one target = 一个目标 - Hit = 命中 - 11(1d12 + 5) slashing damage = 11(1d12 + 5) 挥砍伤害 - plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage = 加上 7(2d6) 黯蚀伤害 - The target's maximum hit points are decreased in equal amount to the necrotic damage dealt = 目标的最大生命值降低的数值等同于所受到的黯蚀伤害 - The target's hit point maximum does not return to normal until it finishes a long rest or its grievous wounds are soothed by a greater restoration spell = 在目标完成一次长休或受到高等复原术治愈其严重创伤之前，其生命值上限不会恢复正常 I'll use precise gaming terminology to ensure accuracy. I'll focus on maintaining the exact mechanical details while translating the game's mechanics into Chinese. 近战武器攻击：+8 命中，触及 5 尺，一个目标。命中：11（1d12 + 5）点挥砍伤害，外加 7（2d6）点黯蚀伤害。目标的最大生命值降低的数值等同于其所受到的黯蚀伤害。在目标完成一次长休或受到高等复原术治愈其严重创伤之前，其生命值上限不会恢复正常。

description.value: The user wants me to translate the given text from English to Simplified Chinese (zh-CN). The text is: "Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage." This appears to be from a tabletop RPG like D&D 5e, describing an attack. Key terms to translate: - Ranged Weapon Attack = 远程武器攻击 - to hit = 命中 - range = 射程 - one target = 一个目标 - Hit = 命中 - piercing damage = 穿刺伤害 - ft. (feet) = 英尺 Let me translate: "远程武器攻击：+5 命中，射程 150/600 英尺，指定一个目标。命中：6（1d8 + 2）点穿刺伤害。" Wait, in Chinese RPG translations, "to hit" is often translated as "攻击加值" or just "命中". Let me think about the standard conventions. Common translations: - Ranged Weapon Attack = 远程武器攻击 - +5 to hit = +5 命中 - range = 射程 - Hit = 命中 - piercing damage = 穿刺伤害 Actually, looking at common Chinese translations of D&D: - "to hit" is often translated as "攻击加值" or "命中" - "Hit" as the result is "命中" or "造成" Standard translation: "远程武器攻击：+5 命中，射程 150/600 英尺，指定一个目标。命中：造成 6（1d8 + 2）点穿刺伤害。" Or more commonly: "远程武器攻击：+5 命中，射程 150/600 英尺，锁定一个目标。命中：6（1d8 + 2）点穿刺伤害。" I think the most natural translation would be: "远程武器攻击：+5 命中，射程 150/600 英尺，指定一个目标。命中：6（1d8 + 2）穿刺伤害。" I'll adjust the damage translation to be more precise, removing "点" for a more natural-sounding Chinese RPG description. The final version captures the technical RPG terminology while maintaining clarity and conciseness in Chinese. 远程武器攻击：+5 命中，射程 150/600 英尺，指定一个目标。命中：6（1d8 + 2）穿刺伤害。

description.value: The user asks: "Translate text from en to zh-CN. Return only translated text. Domain: item.description" The text: "Choose one of the following effects: Rally: All of Dorokor’s minions within 30 feet that can hear her gain 22 (4d10) temporary hit points." We must translate to Chinese (Simplified) with only the translation, no extra text. Need to decide if "Choose one of the following effects:" is part of the text or just the instruction. The user said: "Translate text from en to zh-CN. Return only translated text. Domain: item.description". So they gave some text: "Choose one of the following effects: Rally: All of Dorokor’s minions within 30 feet that can hear her gain 22 (4d10) temporary hit points." They likely want to translate that entire text. Possibly they might want just the Rally description, but likely they want the whole. I think translate the whole. Let's translate: "Choose one of the following effects:" => "请选择以下效果之一：" "Rally:" => "激励：" "All of Dorokor’s minions within 30 feet that can hear her gain 22 (4d10) temporary hit points." => "所有在30英尺范围内能听到她说话的Dorokor的随从获得22（4d10）临时生命值。" Now check if the translation is accurate. Use Chinese: "临时生命值" is typical for temporary hit points. Could also be "临时生命点数". But "临时生命值" is fine. Thus the translation: "请选择以下效果之一：激励：所有在30英尺范围内能听到她说话的Dorokor的随从获得22（4d10）临时生命值。" Check punctuation: Usually Chinese uses fullwidth colon? "激励：" okay. Ensure consistent style: use Chinese full-width punctuation? It's okay. Thus final answer. 请选择以下效果之一：激励：所有在30英尺范围内能听到她说话的Dorokor的随从获得22（4d10）临时生命值。

description.value: The user wants me to translate text from English to zh-CN (Simplified Chinese). The text is: "All of Dorokor’s minions within 30 feet that can hear her will have advantage on the next attack roll they make before the end of their next turn." Let me translate this carefully: - "All of Dorokor's minions" = "多罗科尔的所有仆从" - "within 30 feet" = "在30英尺范围内" - "that can hear her" = "能听到她说话的" - "will have advantage on" = "在...方面获得优势" - "the next attack roll" = "下一次攻击掷骰" - "they make" = "他们进行的" - "before the end of their next turn" = "在他们下一回合结束之前" Full translation: "多罗科尔30英尺范围内所有能听到她说话的仆从，在其下一回合结束前进行的下一次攻击掷骰将获得优势。" Let me refine this to make it more natural in Chinese: "多罗科尔周围30英尺内所有能听到她说话的仆从，在其下一回合结束前进行的下一次攻击检定将获得优势。" 多罗科尔周围30英尺内所有能听到她说话的仆从，在其下一回合结束前进行的下一次攻击检定将获得优势。

description.value: This is a translation task from English to Simplified Chinese (zh-CN). The text is about a game mechanic involving a character named "Dorokor" and her minions. Let me translate this: - "As a reaction" = 作为反应 - "when a minion dies" = 当一个随从死亡时 - "Dorokor" = Dorokor（保持原名） - "can issue a command to her other minions" = 可以向她的其他随从下达命令 - "Those who can hear her" = 那些能听到她命令的随从 - "gain a reaction they can use to immediately take another movement" = 获得一个反应，可以立即进行另一次移动 So the full translation: "作为反应，当一个随从死亡时，Dorokor可以向她的其他随从下达命令。那些能听到她命令的随从获得一个反应，可以立即进行另一次移动。" 作为反应，当一个随从死亡时，Dorokor可以向她的其他随从下达命令。那些能听到她命令的随从获得一个反应，可以立即进行另一次移动。
